message:
feat(conformance): add community detection conformance test scaffolding

Extend the conformance test executor with operation variants and expected
state fields for four community detection algorithms:

- LouvainCommunitiesQuery: with weight_attr, resolution, and seed params
- ModularityQuery: with explicit community partition and weight_attr
- LabelPropagationCommunitiesQuery: parameter-free label propagation
- GreedyModularityCommunitiesQuery: greedy modularity maximization

Adds corresponding ExecutionContext result slots and ExpectedState fields
(community counts, community lists, modularity score) to support
fixture-driven conformance validation against NetworkX reference outputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
